records.ety: [OE. apperteinen, apertenen, OF. apartenir, F. appartenir, fr. L. appertinere; ad + pertinere to reach to, belong. See Pertain.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Appertained (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Appertaining.]

defs: To belong or pertain, whether by right, nature, appointment, or custom; to relate.
quotes: Give it unto him to whom it appertaineth.
